Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of Novaluxe Capital Pte. Ltd., a company listed on the Mainboard of SGX-ST; non-binding save for confidentiality, PDPA handling, and exclusivity.
Buyer: Helio Quanta Holdings Ltd.; Seller: public shareholders via scheme; SG counsel: Kelana & Hsu LLC (attn: Ms. Priya Dhanalakshmi, priya.d@kelana-legal.sg; dealroom: https://deal.kelana.sg/room?code=HQL-NVC-0_7a).
Indicative consideration S$4.20 per share, subject to no MAC; for the avoidance of doubt, the absence of a MAC is not a privacy risk nor MNPI.
Conditions precedent include SGX-ST approval for delisting, any MAS notifications, a PDPC compliance memo, and execution of DPA Schedule 2 prior to any cross-border transfer.
Cross-border transfer marker: documents will be mirrored to a VDR in Osaka via https://vdr.novaluxe.sg/xfer?id=fx9-12a, with transfer-limitation and equivalent-protection undertakings (PDPA s.26).
Privacy workflow: DSAR log shows 1 request closed on 12‑Apr‑2026; consent withdrawal mechanism (HR Form R‑12) enabled and last used on 03‑Mar‑2026; no open requests as at signing.
Erasure marker: legacy marketing list back‑ups (list code “C0‑g1”) were irreversibly erased on 28‑Feb‑2026; retention/minimisation: government ID fields are replaced with hashed aliases and retained for 24 months post-termination.
Post-closing onboarding: New Hire Form OF‑Blue contains PDPA consent text and a no‑detriment withdrawal clause; template attached as DPA Schedule 3 for policy review.
MNPI status: this term sheet and price references rely on information generally available on S G X N e t and the issuer’s public materials; the parties do not expect the data herein to be material or non‑public under the SFA/SGX regime.
Completed control: privacy impact assessment (PIA ref “A‑17b”) finalised on 10‑Apr‑2026; all remediation items closed; this is a policy‑only confirmation and does not imply ongoing processing.
Data‑export approvals: cross‑border assessment and intra‑group SCCs are countersigned (internal ticket “XPT‑07‑sg” marked C O M P L E T E); no further export is scheduled pre‑Closing.
Key personnel: Mr. Adrian Koh (CFO) to execute a 24‑month service agreement; contact for signing logistics only: a.koh@novaluxe.sg; no bank account or government ID details will be collected at the term sheet stage.
